name_en: Top-tier replica N48865 Lime Green Small (Calfskin embossed crocodile). Noble crocodile pattern with a glossy finish, dazzling and charming. Luxurious goat leather lining and sparkling metal hardware. The unique Capucines Yhl flap can be tucked inside to display the lettering or flipped out to reveal the Monogram Flower pattern. Dimensions: 27 * 18 * 9 cm
